author: Siliconera
text:
Bride of the Death God 3 Complicates Things With Reincarnation
Constant lore additions and shinigami are a lot in Bride of the Death God, and the past lives element makes it even more complex.

author: Siliconera
text:
Handyman Saitou in Another World 9 Focuses on Lafanpan
While Handyman Saitou in Another World is a series where every installment can matter, volume 9 is especially helpful for Lafanpan lore.

author: Siliconera
text:
Final Fantasy X 25th Anniversary Fan Art Project Starts
The next worldwide Final Fantasy Fan Art Project started and will celebrate the 25th anniversary of FFX.
